title: Pro10 PvP
description: This PvP is essential for anyone who wants to be good at PvP. It shrinks swords and axes for better view. Makes arrows more noticeable and is a perfect pack for any pvper. I will update regularly.
body:
This PvP is essential for anyone who wants to be good at PvP. It shrinks swords and axes for better view. Makes arrows more noticeable and is a perfect pack for any pvper. More version compatabilaty out soon!

I will update regularly.
